title: PlayerFatigue
description: A somewhat useful player fatigue plugin.
body:
![Supported Core](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supported%20Core-Spigot-blue)
![Supported Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supported%20Versions-1.7.x--26.x-blue)
![Paid](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paid-No-blue)
![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24.PlayerFatigue&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

## 1. Introduction

> **PlayerFatigue** — A somewhat useful player fatigue plugin.  
> Server owners can set fatigue costs for each block via simple commands.  
> Players will automatically consume fatigue when mining or crafting these blocks. When fatigue is depleted, they can no
> longer continue to break blocks.

- Supports MySQL and local SQLite storage
- Fully customizable fatigue consumption for all items
- Configurable fatigue recovery speed and maximum limit
- Supports accelerated fatigue recovery for players with permissions
- Supports PlaceholderAPI variables
- Continuously maintained and updated frequently with fast bug fixes
- Customizable enabled worlds
- Custom recovery limits per player
- Custom recovery intervals
- Option to recover fatigue for only online players or all players
- Real-time fatigue consumption alerts via ActionBar
